concerns.detail: Contains profanity and severe personal insults ('走狗' meaning lackey/running dog, 'b人' meaning bastard/asshole) directed at an individual involved in editing the document, constituting a pure personal attack rather than criticism of advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 另外警告一下在这里一直删除信息的xcw的走狗，这个b人干的事情几乎全天下人都知道！

concerns.detail: Attacks the credibility of a contributor with an unsupported credential challenge ('你有没有发过paper存疑' - questioning if they have ever published papers) and character judgment ('纯尬黑' - pure defamation/awkward smearing), rather than addressing the factual claim about the advisor's papers.
concerns.excerpt: （存疑这种词都来了。你有没有发过paper存疑。纯尬黑）
